plurals.name: download_delete_selected_confirm
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to delete %d selected song? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete %d selected songs? This action cannot be undone.

plurals.name: local_playlist_delete_songs_confirm
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to remove %d selected song from the playlist?
Are you sure you want to remove %d selected songs from the playlist?

plurals.name: library_delete_selected_confirm
plurals.item: Delete %d selected playlist? This cannot be undone.
Delete %d selected playlists? This cannot be undone.
